training_status: very active (gym 14 years, mountain biking, boxing)

benefits.description: Water retention from HGH but improved sleep aids overall weight and fat loss, resulting in net positive effect
Improved sleep from HGH, which aids in weight and fat loss

side_effects.description: Gets puffy/bloated from HGH and other compounds. Water retention occurs but stopped in short period or user would have discontinued use.

protocol_notes: User has 14+ years of consistent gym experience. Maintains strict diet: pre-made non-processed high-quality meals daily, daily oatmeal, no added sugar Sun-Thursday, cheat day with pastries on Saturday, no fast food or soda in 10 years. Extensive daily water intake. Daily cardio via mountain biking and boxing. Reports general sensitivity to water retention from multiple compounds (also notes creatine sensitivity - bloating clears in ~3 days when discontinued). Benefits from HGH outweigh water retention concerns.
